source.title: 河南95后小伙977元拍下沙漠瓜田 ， 顺手拍下  榴莲中的爱马仕 _ 新浪科技 _ 新浪网

en.summary: A post-95 guy in Henan bought a desert melon field for 977 yuan and also bought a premium durian.
en.why_irrelevant: It's a random piece of Chinese agricultural news far from personal interests.

zh.summary: 河南一位95后小伙用977元拍下沙漠瓜田，还顺手拍下“榴莲中的爱马仕”。
zh.why_irrelevant: 这是一条与中国农业新闻相关的随机信息，与用户日常关注内容无关。

brief: A T. rex fossil sells for $50.1M, banks post record earnings, New York halts data center construction, and UK Covid inquiry reveals £10bn in wasted PPE. Research explores AI's role in writing and communication.
news_summary: T. rex fossil reclaims top price; big banks face risks amid earnings; New York bans data centers for a year; UK Covid inquiry condemns 'VIP lane' PPE contracts; Iran tensions escalate after oil tanker strikes.
papers_summary: Papers examine AI-assisted writing tools (FIERO, playful email tone, U-Lens for uncertainty), visual analytics for crypto manipulation, and data narrative quality issues.

en.brief: A T. rex fossil sells for $50.1M, banks post record earnings, New York halts data center construction, and UK Covid inquiry reveals £10bn in wasted PPE. Research explores AI's role in writing and communication.
en.news_summary: T. rex fossil reclaims top price; big banks face risks amid earnings; New York bans data centers for a year; UK Covid inquiry condemns 'VIP lane' PPE contracts; Iran tensions escalate after oil tanker strikes.
en.papers_summary: Papers examine AI-assisted writing tools (FIERO, playful email tone, U-Lens for uncertainty), visual analytics for crypto manipulation, and data narrative quality issues.

zh.brief: 今日要闻：中国异见人士董广平驾艇偷渡韩国；南海仲裁案十年争议未平；马兴瑞被“双开”。科研方面，多项研究探讨AI在写作、可视化及加密货币中的应用与风险。
zh.news_summary: 董广平冒险驾艇穿越黄海偷渡韩国；南海仲裁案十周年争议持续；马兴瑞因严重违纪被开除党籍公职；直布罗陀与西班牙边境撤关；霸王龙化石以5010万美元成交。
zh.papers_summary: FIERO通过协作游戏激发创意写作；TikTok视频中个人叙事表达气候焦虑；AI撰写邮件对收件人参与度的影响；加密货币操纵风险的视觉分析工具ManiScope；数据叙事失败的分类学。

todays_image.caption: The museum hall once showcased the very T. rex fossil that just reclaimed its throne with a record-breaking $50.1 million sale.
todays_image.title: Hall of Dinosaurs and Fossil Reptiles, Museum of Natural History
